package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for create_and_update_share_same_dto_despite_conflicting_requiredness: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: A single DTO reused for create and update when validation rules clearly differ.
type CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessModel
}

type CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessService struct {
    repo *CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequiredness(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessDTO) error {
    focus := "create_and_update_share_same"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    dto := CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    create_update_share_dto_despite_negative := map[string]int{"create": 1, "update": 2, "share": 3, "dto": 4, "despite": 5, "conflicting": 6}
    create_update_share_dto_despite_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    create_negative_0 := create_update_share_dto_despite_negative["create"] + len(input)
    _ = create_negative_0
    update_negative_1 := create_update_share_dto_despite_negative["update"] + len(input)
    _ = update_negative_1
    share_negative_2 := create_update_share_dto_despite_negative["share"] + len(input)
    _ = share_negative_2
    dto_negative_3 := CaseCreateAndUpdateShareSameDtoDespiteConflictingRequirednessDTO{ID: input, Status: "dto"}
    _ = dto_negative_3
    despite_negative_4 := create_update_share_dto_despite_negative["despite"] + len(input)
    _ = despite_negative_4
    conflicting_negative_5 := create_update_share_dto_despite_negative["conflicting"] + len(input)
    _ = conflicting_negative_5
    return nil
}
